channel.title: Calcora — Free Online Tools Hub
channel.description: 60+ free specialized online calculators and developer tools for Finance, Health, Tech, and more.

item.title: EMI Calculator
item.description: Calculate monthly EMI, total interest, and view amortization schedule for home, car, and personal loans.

item.title: Loan Calculator
item.description: Compare loan options with different tenures, rates, and prepayment scenarios.

item.title: SIP Calculator
item.description: Plan wealth creation with systematic monthly investments and optional annual step-up.

item.title: GST Calculator
item.description: Add or remove GST at 5%, 12%, 18%, or 28% with reverse calculation.

item.title: Tax Calculator
item.description: 2026-27 Income Tax estimator with Old vs New regime comparison.

item.title: Currency Converter
item.description: Convert between 10+ major world currencies with live-feel rates.

item.title: Profit & Loss Calculator
item.description: Calculate profit/loss percentage, markup, and margin.

item.title: Website Cost Estimator
item.description: Estimate development costs based on features, complexity, and tech stack.

item.title: Trip Expense Splitter
item.description: Split group expenses easily with a smart algorithm to minimize transactions.

item.title: Age Calculator
item.description: Calculate exact age in years, months, and days from your birthday.

item.title: Aspect Ratio Calculator
item.description: Resize while maintaining ratio or convert between 16:9, 4:3, and more.

item.title: Date Difference
item.description: Calculate the exact difference between two dates in days, weeks, and months.

item.title: Discount Calculator
item.description: Quickly calculate final price after discount percentage.

item.title: Percentage Calculator
item.description: Calculate percentages, increases, decreases, and ratios instantly.

item.title: Scientific Calculator
item.description: Advanced scientific calculator with trigonometry, logarithms, and more.

item.title: Time Calculator
item.description: Add, subtract, and convert time in hours, minutes, and seconds.

item.title: JSON Formatter
item.description: Beautify, minify, and validate JSON with syntax highlighting.

item.title: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
item.description: Encode and decode Base64 strings and files instantly.

item.title: QR Code Generator
item.description: Generate QR codes for URLs, text, WiFi, and vCards.

item.title: Password Generator
item.description: Generate cryptographically secure passwords with entropy scoring.

item.title: Unit Converter
item.description: Convert length, weight, temperature, volume, speed, and data units.

item.title: Color Code Converter
item.description: Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, and CMYK color formats.

item.title: CSS Clamp Generator
item.description: Design responsive typography with fluid clamp() CSS values.

item.title: Website Font Detector
item.description: Enter a URL to detect fonts, weights, and Google Fonts links.

item.title: JSON to TypeScript
item.description: Instantly generate TypeScript interfaces from JSON objects.

item.title: Markdown Table Generator
item.description: Paste CSV or text to generate clean Markdown tables.

item.title: Color Accessibility
item.description: Check text/background contrast based on WCAG accessibility rules.

item.title: Password Strength
item.description: Visualize password entropy, crack time, and security score.

item.title: Code Screenshot
item.description: Create beautiful code snippet images for social media.

item.title: SERP Snippet Preview
item.description: Preview how your page title and meta description appear in Google Search.

item.title: Open Graph Preview
item.description: Preview social media cards for Facebook, X, and LinkedIn.

item.title: Domain Readability
item.description: Check domain pronunciation, memorability, and SEO friendliness.

item.title: Screenshot to Tailwind
item.description: Upload UI screenshot to suggest matching Tailwind CSS classes.

item.title: Image Compressor
item.description: Compress images without quality loss using browser-side processing.

item.title: Tech Stack Detector
item.description: Identify frameworks, CDNs, analytics, and APIs used by any website.

item.title: API Request Builder
item.description: Test API endpoints and generate code for Fetch, Python, and cURL.

item.title: Privacy Policy Scanner
item.description: Scan websites for trackers and generate privacy policy suggestions.

item.title: Color Palette Extractor
item.description: Extract beautiful color palettes from any image.

item.title: Prompt Structure Analyzer
item.description: Analyze AI prompts for clarity, context, and token optimization.

item.title: README Optimizer
item.description: Preview and optimize GitHub READMEs with badges and formatting.

item.title: Browser Storage Inspector
item.description: Inspect and decode LocalStorage, Cookies, and SessionStorage data.

item.title: UI Spacing Inspector
item.description: Measure margins and padding from any UI screenshot or mockup.

item.title: Error Explainer
item.description: Paste dev errors to get instant explanations and fixes.

item.title: YouTube Text Extractor
item.description: Extract text from YouTube thumbnails using AI OCR.

item.title: Full Website Extractor
item.description: Instantly extract HTML, CSS, Javascript, and capture a website screenshot.

item.title: On-Page SEO Analyzer
item.description: Instantly audit any webpage to check title tags, meta descriptions, headings, image alt texts, and calculate an overall SEO score.

item.title: BMI Calculator
item.description: Calculate Body Mass Index with WHO category classification.

item.title: Calorie Calculator
item.description: Estimate daily calorie needs based on age, weight, height, and activity.

item.title: Water Intake Calculator
item.description: Find your ideal daily water intake based on weight and activity.

item.title: Pregnancy Due Date
item.description: Estimate due date and trimester timeline from last menstrual period.

item.title: Body Fat Calculator
item.description: Estimate body fat percentage using the U.S. Navy method.

item.title: TDEE Calculator
item.description: Calculate Total Daily Energy Expenditure (maintenance calories) based on activity.

item.title: Pregnancy Weight Gain Tracker
item.description: Track recommended weight gain during pregnancy using medically backed IOM guidelines.

item.title: Word & Character Counter
item.description: Instantly counter words, characters, text density, and calculate expected reading times.

item.title: Tip Calculator
item.description: Split restaurant bills easily and figure out exact tips across multiple people instantly.

item.title: Salary to Hourly Calculator
item.description: Convert your annual salary into hourly, daily, weekly, and monthly equivalents.

item.title: Compound Interest Calculator
item.description: Project your future wealth generation using the power of compounded investment interest.

item.title: PDF Merge
item.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document.

item.title: PDF Split
item.description: Extract specific pages or split a PDF into individual files.

item.title: JPG PNG Converter
item.description: Convert images between JPG and PNG formats instantly.

item.title: Image Resizer
item.description: Resize images to exact dimensions with aspect ratio lock.

item.title: Favicon Generator
item.description: Generate .ico, PWA, and Apple icons from a single logo image.

item.title: File Compressor
item.description: Compress files in-browser without uploading to any server.

item.title: SVG Optimizer
item.description: Minify and clean SVG files by removing unnecessary metadata.
